query:
SELECT o.orderNumber, o.subtotal, o.stateGst, o.centralGst, o.totalAmount,
       oi.productName, oi.unitPrice, oi.lineTotal, oi.specialInstructions
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON oi.orderId = o.id
WHERE o.orderNumber = '00887';
